title: Asuka Question
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Question             Quote Post by PIN_H34D » Thu Sep 03, 2009 12:53 am hey people Im new here to the forum, but i love NGE... its my fave Anime... i just finished watching 1.0 (about 6 months ago) & 2.0 for the 3rd time in 2 days and is anyone els upset they changed Asukas name from Asuka Langley Sohryu to Asuka Langley Shikinami... y did they change it? it kind of bothering me... and i like how they made all the pilots feel a bit more human and instead of starting a new forum, any word when 3.0 and 4.0 will be released?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Sep 03, 2009 12:55 am who knows? And no Im not upset, as long as Asuka-sama is Asuka-sama I dont care what they change her name to as long as its not something stupid.

[]: Re: Asuka Question (Spoiler)             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 03, 2009 1:23 am PIN_H34D wrote: is anyone els upset they changed Asukas name from Asuka Langley Sohryu to Asuka Langley Shikinami... y did they change it?

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Thu Sep 03, 2009 2:54 pm 3.0 and 4.0 are both scheduled to be released at the same time and are to be shown alongside each other. I am not sure when but I think it will be either this coming summer or the summer after that. Here's my source, for what it's worth. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rebuild_of_evangelion

[]: Re: Asuka Question (Spoiler)             Quote Post by franzchristoph » Thu Sep 03, 2009 7:53 pm PIN_H34D wrote: hey people Im new here to the forum, but i love NGE... its my fave Anime...

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Thu Sep 03, 2009 10:58 pm Iam(not)toji wrote: 3.0 and 4.0 are both scheduled to be released at the same time and are to be shown alongside each other. I am not sure when but I think it will be either this coming summer or the summer after that. Here's my source, for what it's worth. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rebuild_of_evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 04, 2009 2:20 am I wasn't upset but there was a number of Asuka die hards that were.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Sep 04, 2009 8:06 pm I wasn't upset or anything but I must say I was kind of disappointed that she's German and then they gave her a completely Japanese name whereas in NGE her name sounded at least somewhat German.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Fri Sep 04, 2009 8:48 pm Soryu so does not sound german. She's part Japanese anyway isn't she? I'd take that 3.0 and 4.0 to be released together with a grain of salt, I haven't heard about it anywhere else besides wikipedia.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 04, 2009 8:53 pm Evafan wrote: Soryu so does not sound german. She's part Japanese anyway isn't she?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 04, 2009 9:12 pm Evafan wrote: Soryu so does not sound german. She's part Japanese anyway isn't she? I'd take that 3.0 and 4.0 to be released together with a grain of salt, I haven't heard about it anywhere else besides wikipedia.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Sep 04, 2009 9:50 pm Ornette wrote: It was stated they'd be shown back to back in the original announcement back in 2006-ish

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Sep 05, 2009 7:45 pm They were supposed to be released in the same year? Anno must be from Pluto...Then it would be in the same year...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Sep 06, 2009 10:40 pm It was announced to be released over the course of 2 years. Being behind schedule is nothing new.
